name: Lemon Thyme Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons dried lemon thyme or twice as much fresh, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, cream of tartar, and salt.
2. Cream butter with sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs and mix well.
4. Work in the flour mixture until well blended.
5. Stir in the lemon thyme.
6. Chill for 4 hours or overnight.
7. Roll into walnut-sized balls.
8. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 350°F for about 10 minutes.
